title: SACRAMENTO—Today, Senator Anna M. Caballero introduced SB 230, which includes changes to California’s use of force statutes, law enforcement agency policies, and training officers

raw_text:

  "claims": [
    "SB 230 will establish first-in-the-nation requirements for law enforcement agencies to adopt use-of-force policies.",
    "California will lead the nation in use of force policy requirements by ensuring robust officer training.",
    "SB 230 will provide comprehensive and clear guidelines on utilizing de-escalation tactics for law enforcement agencies.",
